subcodes.first_line: This is a mention from Us unto him who desireth to drink from the Kawthar of life through the bounteous hands of his Lord, the All-Bountiful, that he may be drawn nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یشرب کوثر الحیوان من ایادی عطاء ربه الکریم لیجذبه
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
